_meta.purpose: Hand-labeled prompt → TaskTier ground truth. Pin the ModelRouter classifier at >=0.85 accuracy.

tiers.standard: routine engineering — quick-class (build / test / install / lint / format)
tiers.complex: non-trivial reasoning — balanced-class (refactor / debug / design / audit / optimize)
tiers.reasoning: frontier-class — multi-system, comprehensive, from-scratch, across-multiple-X work

_meta.gate: accuracy >= 0.85; do not tighten the gate if natural accuracy is higher

items.prompt: ls
pwd
cd Sources
cat README.md
rm -rf build
mv old.txt new.txt
echo hello world
date
whoami
mkdir spec
chmod +x bin/run
type git
which swift
hostname
touch foo.swift
run the unit test suite
build and deploy the latest staging release
install the project dependencies
lint and format the source files
start the development server on port 3000
stop the running redis container
check if the integration tests are green
format the swift sources with swiftformat
build the release binary for distribution
run the migration on the staging database
test the new helper function on edge cases
deploy the new build to fly.io
lint the changed files in the diff
install homebrew packages from the brewfile
start a fresh swift package init
refactor the authentication middleware to use the new token store
debug the failing snapshot test in PaneRouterTests
investigate the latency spike on the search endpoint
audit the recent security incident logs
optimize the SQL query for the dashboard rollup
design a sane retry policy for the LLM client
architect the new MCP tool dispatcher layer
migrate the user store from sqlite to postgres
improve the performance of the diff viewer
refactor the model router to support task tiers
investigate why the CI is flaky
debug the race condition in the queue
design the schema for tier-aware routing analytics
optimize the cold start time of the app
refactor the fixtures to share setup helpers
refactor the entire codebase to use the new model abstraction
design a new architecture from scratch for the indexer

refactor the authentication system across multiple services and teams
investigate and debug the comprehensive failure mode of the queue

audit and refactor all files in the security-critical paths comprehensively

investigate the entire codebase for performance bottlenecks comprehensively
